top_signals.title: Nvidia is investing billions into this emerging technology that could change the AI industry
top_signals.summary: Photonics is considered to be a more efficient alternative to the current process of transferring data using electricity, which could be crucial to the AI boom.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Jupiter Fund Taps Europe’s AI Energy Boom to Beat 92% of Peers
top_signals.summary: Homing in on stocks at the heart of Europe’s electrification push has helped a Jupiter Asset Management fund team outperform 92% of its peers this year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
